title: Assigning a team to a board created from a template in workflow
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: ClareHughes (Clare Fox)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When you have a workflow that creates a new board from a template you can now assign teams. However - when the board is created it assigns all the members of that team as individuals. Our team members change and we need them to have access to the boards their teams should be able to see so having individuals doesn’t work. Please allow assigning a team in the workflow to actually mean you’re assigning a team.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to be able to assign a team to the board I’m creating in my workflow and have them remain a team - not the individuals.
